principle: View and Text are the Tamagui base primitives
explanation: Import from `tamagui` or `@tamagui/core`. View = RN View + Tamagui style superset + press/hover/focus events (like Pressable). Text = RN Text + Tamagui styles. Both accept inline styles, $-prefix selectors, hoverStyle/pressStyle etc. Use them for inline styling; extend via `styled()` for reusable components. Order of style props is significant.

principle: XStack = flex row, YStack = flex column, ZStack = absolute overlap
explanation: XStack = `flexDirection: 'row'`. YStack = `flexDirection: 'column'` (default). ZStack = absolute-positioned children stacked on top of each other. All extend View — accept all Tamagui style props. Use `gap="$4"` for spacing between children. `elevation` creates a platform-native-looking shadow that grows with size.

principle: group prop transforms any Stack into a group context
explanation: Adding `group` (or `group="name"`) to a Stack makes it a container query root. Child components can then use `$group-hover`, `$group-press`, `$group-sm` selectors. No import changes needed — it's a built-in prop. Named groups enable `$group-name-hover` cross-component targeting.

principle: Button: size prop cascades to text, icon, borderRadius, padding
explanation: Tamagui Button accepts `size` (SizeTokens) — one prop sets padding, border radius, font size, icon size simultaneously via size-spread variants. Variants: `outlined` (transparent bg, visible border). Props: `icon`, `iconAfter`, `iconSize`, `scaleIcon`, `circular`, `chromeless`, `unstyled`. Defaults to `type="button"` to prevent form-submit. In v2, text styling uses `<Button.Text>` subcomponent.

principle: Button.Apply enables group-based interactive theming
explanation: Set `group="btn"` on the Button frame and use `$group-btn-hover`/`$group-btn-press` on Button.Text or Button.Icon children to coordinate hover/press visual state across sub-components. This replaces the old pattern of prop-drilling active states.

principle: SizableText and Paragraph add the size prop for theme-aware typography
explanation: `SizableText` extends Text with a `size` spread variant that maps to font size, line height, letter spacing, and font weight — all from your createFont config. `Paragraph` extends SizableText with `tag='p'`, `color='$color'`, `userSelect='auto'`, `whiteSpace='normal'`. Use Paragraph for readable prose; SizableText for span-level inline text.

principle: Text truncation: ellipsis prop and numberOfLines
explanation: `ellipsis` = shorthand for `numberOfLines={1}`. On web: `text-overflow: ellipsis` + `white-space: nowrap` + `overflow: hidden`. On native: `numberOfLines={1}`. `numberOfLines={3}` → multi-line clamp via `-webkit-line-clamp` on web, native `numberOfLines` on native. Both work on Text, SizableText, and Paragraph.

principle: Input/TextArea: web-first API with native mapping
explanation: v2 Inputs use HTML input attributes directly — `type="password"`, `type="email"`, `enterKeyHint` for keyboard return key. `onChange` is preferred over `onChangeText`. On native Tamagui maps these to RN equivalents. TextArea uses `rows` instead of `numberOfLines`. Migration from v1: `secureTextEntry` → `type="password"`, `keyboardType="email-address"` → `type="email"`.

principle: Form + Form.Trigger enables accessible universal forms
explanation: `<Form onSubmit={fn}>…<Form.Trigger asChild><Button /></Form.Trigger></Form>`. `Form.Trigger` calls `onSubmit` when pressed — works on native and web. Produces accessible markup on web (`<form>`). Use `asChild` to wrap any pressable element as the submit trigger.

principle: Dialog: accessible modal with optional Sheet adaptation
explanation: Anatomy: `Dialog > Dialog.Trigger > Dialog.Portal > Dialog.Overlay + Dialog.Content > Dialog.Title + Dialog.Description + Dialog.Close`. Title and Description required for accessibility. Dismiss: click outside, Escape, or Close. `modal={false}` removes focus trap and allows background interaction. Use `Dialog.Adapt when="max-md"` + `<Dialog.Sheet>` to render as a Sheet on mobile.

principle: Dialog.Scoping: mount at root, trigger from anywhere
explanation: Add matching `scope="myDialog"` to both `<Dialog>` (placed at app root) and `<Dialog.Trigger>`. Lets you avoid React context issues in portals and improves performance for deeply nested triggers. Same pattern works for Popover and Tooltip.

principle: Popover: floating pane with 12 placements and arrow
explanation: Anatomy: `Popover > Popover.Trigger + Popover.Content > Popover.Arrow`. 12 placement options (top/bottom/left/right × center/start/end). `allowFlip` repositions when no space. `stayInFrame` adds 10px viewport padding. `transformOrigin: true` auto-calculates for scale animations. On mobile, adapt to Sheet.

principle: Sheet: bottom panel with snap points and drag support
explanation: Anatomy: `Sheet > Sheet.Overlay + Sheet.Handle + Sheet.Frame`. `snapPoints` defaults to [80, 10] (percent). `modal={true}` renders at app root. `disableDrag` removes gesture. `moveOnKeyboardChange` shifts sheet up on native keyboard. `dismissOnOverlayPress` defaults true. Install `react-native-gesture-handler` for smoother scroll-to-drag transitions.

principle: Adapt: render one component for web, another for native/mobile
explanation: `<Adapt when="max-md"><Sheet>…<Adapt.Contents /></Sheet></Adapt>` — Tamagui renders the Adapt contents (Dialog/Popover/Select inner content) inside the wrapper when the condition is true. `Adapt.Contents` preserves all children and event handlers from the original. Condition can be any media query key.

principle: Select: accessible dropdown with typeahead, adapts to Sheet on mobile
explanation: Anatomy: `Select > Select.Trigger + Select.Content > Select.Viewport > Select.Item + Select.ItemText`. Keyboard navigable with typeahead. Use `lazyMount` + `renderValue` together for pages with many Selects — defers mounting all items until first open. Must adapt to Sheet on native (no native dropdown API).

principle: Tabs: horizontal/vertical, automatic or manual activation
explanation: `activationMode="automatic"` selects on focus; `"manual"` requires click/Enter. Anatomy: `Tabs > Tabs.List > Tabs.Tab + Tabs.Content`. Three modes: Styled (default), Unstyled (`createTabs`), Headless (`useTabs` hook with no core dep). `orientation` for vertical layout. Full keyboard navigation with looping.

principle: Switch: toggle with native fallback and three implementation levels
explanation: Props: `checked`/`defaultChecked`, `onCheckedChange`, `size`, `activeTheme`, `activeStyle`. `native` prop renders a platform-native switch on mobile. Three levels: Styled (default), Unstyled (`createSwitch`), Headless (`useSwitch` — zero core dep, returns `checkboxProps`, `checkboxRef`, hidden input for forms).

principle: Checkbox: tri-state (true/false/indeterminate), headless available
explanation: Supports `checked` values: `true`, `false`, `'indeterminate'`. Indeterminate is useful for select-all patterns. `native` prop renders HTML checkbox. Headless mode via `@tamagui/checkbox-headless` + `useCheckbox` hook returns `checkboxProps`, `checkboxRef`, hidden form input — zero Tamagui dependency.

principle: Slider: range input with multiple thumbs and keyboard control
explanation: Anatomy: `Slider > Slider.Track > Slider.TrackActive + Slider.Thumb`. `defaultValue` is an array — multiple entries = multiple thumbs (range select). `step` controls keyboard increment. On iOS: pass safe area insets to TamaguiProvider or thumb tracking will misalign due to safe area offsets.

principle: Group: automatic border-radius management for button/input rows
explanation: Wrap items in `Group.Item`. Group zeros out connecting-side radius between adjacent items. `size` on Group only sets borderRadius — child sizing is controlled by each child directly. `forcePlacement` on `Group.Item` overrides detection: 'first', 'center', 'last'. For dynamic children, use `useGroupItem` hook or map with index.

principle: Accordion: collapsible sections, single or multiple open
explanation: Anatomy: `Accordion > Accordion.Item > Accordion.Header > Accordion.Trigger + Accordion.Content`. `type="single"` allows only one open at a time (`collapsible` prop lets you close it); `type="multiple"` allows any number. Set `defaultValue` for initial open items. Full keyboard navigation.

principle: Tooltip: hover tooltip, web-only rendering
explanation: Doesn't render on native (provides accessibility output instead). `restMs` = time cursor must rest before showing; `delay` = max time. `groupId` — tooltips in same group skip delay after first shows. `TooltipGroup` manages multi-tooltip delay behavior. `placement` has 12 options. Uses `PortalProvider` (modal=true by default).

principle: Toast: universal feedback notification with native integrations
explanation: `useToastController().show('Message', { duration, message })`. `ToastProvider` configures global duration (default 5000ms), swipe direction, native options. `ToastViewport` is a portal with positioning. Native: SPIndicator on iOS, ToastAndroid on Android, Notification API on web. Install `burnt` for native. Custom data via TS module augmentation.

principle: Spinner: thin ActivityIndicator wrapper, size limited to small/large
explanation: `<Spinner size="large" color="$green10" />`. Extends YStack so accepts all layout props. Size options limited by RN ActivityIndicator API (small/large only). Works on web and native. Include in buttons during loading state, or standalone as a page loader.

principle: Card: themeable container with Header, Footer, Background sub-components
explanation: `size` prop on Card cascades to padding, border radius, and child sizing. `elevate` boolean adds visual elevation. `Card.Background` renders behind content at lower z-index — useful for images or gradients. All sub-components accept `unstyled` to remove Tamagui defaults.

principle: Image: SSR-safe cross-platform with pluggable backend
explanation: `<Image src="..." width={200} height={200} objectFit="cover" />`. Supports `loading="lazy"`, `fetchPriority`, `srcSet`/`sizes` on web. `alt` required for accessibility. Use `createImage` to integrate expo-image for blurhash placeholders, transitions, and CDN caching while keeping Tamagui's style API.

principle: Portal: renders children in a different part of the tree
explanation: `stackZIndex` auto-manages layering across nested portals. `passThrough` renders without portal. For native: install `react-native-teleport` and import `@tamagui/native/setup-teleport` at entry to preserve React context inside Sheet/Dialog/Popover. Without it custom contexts aren't available in portaled content. Alternative: use `scope` prop to co-locate trigger and content.

principle: Native integrations are opt-in: gestures, menus, toast, linear-gradient
explanation: All native integrations follow the same pattern: install the package, import its setup module before Tamagui in your app entry, optionally pass a `native` prop to the component. Gesture handler: better press detection + smoother Sheet; native menus: iOS/Android system context menus with haptics; native LinearGradient: expo-linear-gradient for GPU-accelerated gradients.

principle: FontLanguage: context-based font switching via CSS variables
explanation: `<FontLanguage body="cn"><Text fontFamily="$body">你好</Text></FontLanguage>`. Define variant fonts with suffix: `body_cn: createFont({…})`. On web uses CSS vars — no re-renders when switching. Reset to default with `<FontLanguage body="default">`. Works with `styled()` — define `fontFamily="$body"` once and language switches transparently.
